summary: Security hardening testing completed. All 30 security tests PASS. Security headers, rate limiting, attack pattern blocking, input sanitization, password validation, prohibited content detection, payment exception handling, and IP blocking mechanisms are all working correctly.

minor.issue: File expiry message inconsistency: Messages say '15 minutes' but actual FILE_EXPIRY_MINUTES is set to 3 minutes. This could confuse users.
minor.fix: Update messages to say '3 minutes' to match actual expiry

action_items: FIX: Update file expiry messages from '15 minutes' to '3 minutes' in server.py and GenStudioHistory.js to match actual FILE_EXPIRY_MINUTES=3
critical_code_review_comments: Security headers correctly implemented: X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, X-XSS-Protection, CSP, Referrer-Policy
Rate limiting working: 5/min for register, 10/min for login, 10/min for payment orders, 20/min for payment verification
Password strength validation enforces: min 8 chars, uppercase, lowercase, number, special character
Prohibited content detection blocks: deepfake, celebrity, violence, explicit content
IP blocking mechanism: blocks IP after 10 suspicious attempts
File expiry set to 3 minutes (FILE_EXPIRY_MINUTES=3, GENSTUDIO_FILE_EXPIRY_MINUTES=3, PDF_FILE_EXPIRY_MINUTES=3)
Input sanitization using bleach library for XSS prevention
Attack pattern detection for path traversal, SQL injection, XSS, command injection
context_for_next_testing_agent: All security features are working correctly. Security module (security.py) implements rate limiting, input sanitization, security headers, IP blocking, and attack pattern detection. File expiry is 3 minutes. Only minor issue is message inconsistency (says 15 min but actual is 3 min).
